identity_notes: held the east cache — other squirrel assessed in four seconds and left; read correctly
marks on a fence post: someone made something in a specific place and it was still there
question running: whether what you make lasts, and whether that changes what it was when it was made
hunger arrived specific — not the usual kind; this was noted as interesting
east cache avoided; went west with attention to spare
found a good spot; ate well; mentally filed it as worth revisiting
the fence-post question (does a lucky thing stay what it was?) found a new surface: is a lucky food source a reliable one?

change_summary.notable_shift: same unusual hunger, same western forage, but from adequacy the search was curiosity not crisis; found genuinely good food and filed the location; the running question from Day 2 transferred cleanly to a new surface
